{{Infobox character
| name = Resh
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Resh]] is a member of the [[Sandvipers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Resh]] reluctantly met [[Yerin]]'s eyes.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Resh]] is a member of the [[Sandviper sect]] who was defeated by a [[Copper]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
